headline: Why Your Company Isn't Taking Your Toxic Exposure Seriously
articleBody: Inhaling fumes at work can lead to permanent damage, but your company might claim it's just "seasonal allergies." It’s frustrating when they ignore the safety gear they failed to provide. You deserve a workplace that doesn't make you sick. If you’re facing pushback on a toxic exposure claim, we’re here to help you fight for the settlement you need to breathe easy again.
